title: Re-enable git ADD escape directory test
body:
Use repo-local git identity so the test passes in CI without affecting the caller's global git config.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/6876

comments.body: In other tests we build the repository ahead of time and archive it under `tests/git-daemon`, then extract it before serving it out.  Why not do that?

> In other tests we build the repository ahead of time and archive it under `tests/git-daemon`, then extract it before serving it out. Why not do that?

I just followed the same approach as the PoC and didn't think of doing it that way. Should I change it?
It avoids certain variables that aren't the point of the test anyway, so yes, please.
PTAL @podman-container-tools/buildah-maintainers CI failure seems to be unrelated. + I cannot rerun CI.
PTAL @podman-container-tools/buildah-maintainers @podman-container-tools/buildah-reviewers  CI failure seems to be unrelated.
